codeReview.summary: The feature implementation matches the contract: SettingsSidebar now enforces live validation and disabled-submit gating for short/mismatch/same-as-current cases, maps wrong-current failures to a canonical inline error, and AppStateProvider guards and normalizes wrong-password decrypt failures before re-encrypting. Added component + provider tests cover VAL-SETTINGS-018/019/026/027/028 including no-rotation on wrong current and old-vs-new unlock behavior after successful password change.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-screen-worker skill procedure currently requires a Playwright demo-gallery run in its Verify step, but this feature's contract verification steps and actual worker execution used tsc + vitest + agent-browser only; the worker still marked followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ui-screen-worker/SKILL.md (Work Procedure step 6 includes `npx playwright test src/e2e/demo-gallery.spec.ts`); mission features.json entry for m5-change-password verificationSteps omits Playwright; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId b4bf3459-cef3-4ba8-be1d-e7b044d3c648 shows no Playwright command.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 76f1367 diff for m5-change-password. Implementation is consistent with required behavior and includes strong automated coverage; no feature defects were identified.
